title: Stunning Blue & Pink Gender Reveal Party Luncheon Napkins (16cm) - Perfect for Gender Reveal Parties - 16ct
features: VIBRANT BLUE & PINK DESIGN: Our stunning blue & pink gender reveal party luncheon napkins add a pop of color and excitement to your event, perfectly capturing the anticipation and joy of discovering your baby's gender together with friends and family.

HIGH-QUALITY, STURDY MATERIAL: Crafted from durable material, these napkins won't easily tear or fall apart, ensuring you and your guests can enjoy the party without worrying about frequent napkin changes or messy hands.

PERFECT FOR GENDER REVEAL PARTIES: Celebrate the big reveal in style with these 16cm napkins specifically designed for gender reveal parties - add a touch of fun and flair to your party décor, while confidently handling spills and messes.

CONVENIENT & DISPOSABLE: Save time and effort with these disposable napkins, making post-party cleanup a breeze. Simply toss them in the trash when the celebration is over, leaving you with more time to cherish the special memories created.

VALUE PACK OF 16: This pack includes 16 gender reveal napkins, providing ample supply for your event and ensuring every attendee can join in the celebration while enjoying tasty treats during this unforgettable moment.
description: From the manufacturer Coordinating Solid Colours Lovely Pink Powder Blue Gender Reveal Party Add-On Items What will baby be? What do you think? Boy or Girl? Blue or Pink? Add some fun and mystery to your special occasion and impress your guests with these simple and elegant designs! A great selection of tableware, accessories and decorations will let you celebrate the joyous occasion in style! Mix and match with our solid colour items to create the perfect party look! We Have Everything Covered! Paper Plates, Napkins, Paper Cups, Decorations & Accessories... More coordinating ranges available! Are you having helium balloons? Don’t forget the curling ribbon and weights! And if Gender Reveal Party isn't your style, check out our other elegant options.
